original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: Management of Investigation Results in the Emergency Department
original_registry_entry.version: Best Practice Guideline, reviewed and updated February 2023
original_registry_entry.jurisdiction: United Kingdom emergency medicine; requires UAE governance and pathway adaptation
original_registry_entry.population: Adults and children whose pathology or radiology investigations were requested or reviewed by an emergency department.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Emergency department result review, communication, handover and follow-up governance.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for recording which test was requested, the result or report review, action taken, responsibility, referral or handover and patient communication. It does not interpret a result or generate management.

exact_sections.heading: Summary and pathology/radiology recommendations — traceable review and responsibility
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports a traceable record of review, action, responsibility, referral and handover for pathology and radiology results.

exact_sections.heading: Operational guidance — result review, patient communication, record and follow-up action
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting the specific test, reviewed result or report, communication and clinician-determined follow-up action.

title: Management of Investigation Results in the Emergency Department
jurisdiction: United Kingdom emergency medicine; requires UAE governance and pathway adaptation
population: Adults and children whose pathology or radiology investigations were requested or reviewed by an emergency department.
intended_setting: Emergency department result review, communication, handover and follow-up governance.
